note: SAMPLE manifest — a few provisions for demonstration. Not the full corpus. Content hashes are computed live from the excerpts shipped here.

documents.title: Agreement under UNCLOS on the Conservation and Sustainable Use of Marine Biological Diversity of Areas Beyond National Jurisdiction
documents.official_citation: Adopted 19 June 2023; entered into force 17 January 2026 (C.N.447.2025.TREATIES-XXI.10)

provisions.Article 7: Parties shall be guided by the following principles and approaches: (a) the polluter-pays principle; (b) the principle of the common heritage of humankind; (c) the freedom of marine scientific research.

documents.title: United Nations Convention on the Law of the Sea (parent framework)

provisions.Article 87: The high seas are open to all States, whether coastal or land-locked. Freedom of the high seas is exercised under the conditions laid down by this Convention and by other rules of international law.
